+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/checks/ability/route.ts

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..8a7c0d4403fc44ca8a2edafc093be6e9f2d000ff

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/checks/ability/route.ts

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+
+type DiceRequest = {

+};
+

+}

+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+

+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+

+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });

+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/checks/ability/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}

+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+  level?: unknown;
+};

+  count?: unknown;

+  party?: unknown;

+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;

+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts

+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+  }
+

+

+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||

+

+    return badRequest();

+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

const _fs = require("fs");
const _resolvefrom = require("./resolve-from");
const _path = require("path");
function hasNecessaryDependencies(baseDir, requiredPackages) {
    let resolutions = new Map();
    const missingPackages = [];
    for (const p of requiredPackages){
        try {
            const pkgPath = (0, _fs.realpathSync)((0, _resolvefrom.resolveFrom)(baseDir, `${p.pkg}/package.json`));
            const pkgDir = (0, _path.dirname)(pkgPath);
            resolutions.set((0, _path.join)(p.pkg, 'package.json'), pkgPath);
            if (p.exportsRestrict) {
                const fileNameToVerify = (0, _path.relative)(p.pkg, p.file);
                if (fileNameToVerify) {
                    const fileToVerify = (0, _path.join)(pkgDir, fileNameToVerify);
                    if ((0, _fs.existsSync)(fileToVerify)) {
                        resolutions.set(p.pkg, fileToVerify);
                    } else {
                        missingPackages.push(p);
                        continue;
                    }
                } else {
                    resolutions.set(p.pkg, pkgPath);
                }
            } else {
                resolutions.set(p.pkg, (0, _resolvefrom.resolveFrom)(baseDir, p.file));
            }
        } catch (_) {
            missingPackages.push(p);
            continue;
        }
    }
    return {
        resolved: resolutions,
        missing: missingPackages
    };
}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts

+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts

+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
