new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

codex
The root cause is the pinned TypeScript 7 package layout: it no longer has `lib/typescript.js`, but Next 16’s dependency check looks for that exact path. I’m checking the package layout to add the smallest compatibility bridge if needed.

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", {
    value: true
});

    enumerable: true,
    get: function() {
        return getTypeScriptIntent;
    }
});
const _fs = require("fs");
const _path = /*#__PURE__*/ _interop_require_default(require("path"));
const _recursivereaddir = require("../recursive-readdir");
function _interop_require_default(obj) {
    return obj && obj.__esModule ? obj : {
        default: obj
    };
}
async function getTypeScriptIntent(baseDir, intentDirs, tsconfigPath) {
    const resolvedTsConfigPath = _path.default.join(baseDir, tsconfigPath);
    // The integration turns on if we find a `tsconfig.json` in the user's
    // project.
    const hasTypeScriptConfiguration = (0, _fs.existsSync)(resolvedTsConfigPath);
    if (hasTypeScriptConfiguration) {
        const content = (0, _fs.readFileSync)(resolvedTsConfigPath, {
            encoding: 'utf8'
        }).trim();
        return {
            firstTimeSetup: content === '' || content === '{}'
        };
    }
    // Next.js also offers a friendly setup mode that bootstraps a TypeScript
    // project for the user when we detect TypeScript files. So, we need to check
    // the `pages/` directory for a TypeScript file.
    // Checking all directories is too slow, so this is a happy medium.
    const tsFilesRegex = /.*\.(ts|tsx)$/;
    const excludedRegex = /(node_modules|.*\.d\.ts$)/;
    for (const dir of intentDirs){
        const typescriptFiles = await (0, _recursivereaddir.recursiveReadDir)(dir, {
            pathnameFilter: (name)=>tsFilesRegex.test(name),
            ignoreFilter: (name)=>excludedRegex.test(name)
        });
        if (typescriptFiles.length) {
            return {
                firstTimeSetup: true
            };
        }
    }
    return false;
}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/checks/ability/route.ts

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

function getRequiredConfiguration(typescript) {
    const res = {};
    const typescriptVersion = typescript.version;
    const desiredCompilerOptions = getDesiredCompilerOptions(typescriptVersion);
    for (const optionKey of Object.keys(desiredCompilerOptions)){
        const ev = desiredCompilerOptions[optionKey];
        if (!('value' in ev)) {
            continue;
        }
        const value = ev.parsedValue ?? ev.value;
        // Convert string values back to TypeScript enum values
        if (optionKey === 'module' && typeof value === 'string') {
            const moduleMap = {
                esnext: typescript.ModuleKind.ESNext,
                es2020: typescript.ModuleKind.ES2020,
                ...typescript.ModuleKind.Preserve !== undefined ? {
                    preserve: typescript.ModuleKind.Preserve
                } : {},
                nodenext: typescript.ModuleKind.NodeNext,
                node16: typescript.ModuleKind.Node16,
                commonjs: typescript.ModuleKind.CommonJS,
                amd: typescript.ModuleKind.AMD
            };
            res[optionKey] = moduleMap[value.toLowerCase()] ?? value;
        } else if (optionKey === 'moduleResolution' && typeof value === 'string') {
            const moduleResolutionMap = {
                bundler: typescript.ModuleResolutionKind.Bundler,
                node16: typescript.ModuleResolutionKind.Node16,
                nodenext: typescript.ModuleResolutionKind.NodeNext,
                node12: typescript.ModuleResolutionKind.Node12,
                node: typescript.ModuleResolutionKind.Node10 ?? typescript.ModuleResolutionKind.NodeJs
            };
            res[optionKey] = moduleResolutionMap[value.toLowerCase()] ?? value;
        } else if (optionKey === 'jsx' && typeof value === 'string') {
            const jsxMap = {
                'react-jsx': typescript.JsxEmit.ReactJSX
            };
            res[optionKey] = jsxMap[value.toLowerCase()] ?? value;
        } else {
            res[optionKey] = value;
        }
    }
    return res;
}
const localDevTestFilesExcludeAction = 'NEXT_PRIVATE_LOCAL_DEV_TEST_FILES_EXCLUDE';

                // Check if the option has a single parsed value
                if (check.parsedValue) {
                    return check.parsedValue !== existingValue;
                }
                // Fall back to direct value comparison
                return check.value !== existingValue;
            };

                if (!userTsConfig.compilerOptions) {
                    userTsConfig.compilerOptions = {};

            '**/*.ts',
            '**/*.tsx'
        ];

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}

+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+};
+

+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+

+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts

+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};

+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+

+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||

+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+

+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/checks/ability/route.ts

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -euo pipefail
+
+# Next 16 still probes for the TypeScript 5 compiler API path. The pinned
+# TypeScript 7 package has a different layout, but dev mode only needs these
+# values for setup when SWC/Turbopack compiles the app routes.
+if [ ! -f node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js ]; then
+  mkdir -p node_modules/typescript/lib
+  printf '{"type":"commonjs"}\n' > node_modules/typescript/lib/package.json
+  cat > node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js <<'EOF'
+const versionModule = require("./version.cjs");
+
+module.exports = {
+  version: versionModule.version || versionModule.default || "7.0.2",
+  ModuleKind: {
+    CommonJS: 1,
+    AMD: 2,
+    ES2020: 6,
+    ESNext: 99,
+    Node16: 100,
+    NodeNext: 199,
+    Preserve: 200,
+  },
+  ModuleResolutionKind: {
+    NodeJs: 2,
+    Node10: 2,
+    Node12: 2,
+    Node16: 3,
+    NodeNext: 99,
+    Bundler: 100,
+  },
+  JsxEmit: {
+    ReactJSX: 4,
+  },
+};
+EOF
+fi
+
 next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p "$PORT"

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..8a7c0d4403fc44ca8a2edafc093be6e9f2d000ff

+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/checks/ability/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -euo pipefail
+
+# Next 16 still probes for the TypeScript 5 compiler API path. The pinned
+# TypeScript 7 package has a different layout, but dev mode only needs these
+# values for setup when SWC/Turbopack compiles the app routes.
+if [ ! -f node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js ]; then
+  mkdir -p node_modules/typescript/lib
+  printf '{"type":"commonjs"}\n' > node_modules/typescript/lib/package.json
+  cat > node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js <<'EOF'
+const versionModule = require("./version.cjs");
+
+module.exports = {
+  version: versionModule.version || versionModule.default || "7.0.2",
+  ModuleKind: {
+    CommonJS: 1,
+    AMD: 2,
+    ES2020: 6,
+    ESNext: 99,
+    Node16: 100,
+    NodeNext: 199,
+    Preserve: 200,
+  },
+  ModuleResolutionKind: {
+    NodeJs: 2,
+    Node10: 2,
+    Node12: 2,
+    Node16: 3,
+    NodeNext: 99,
+    Bundler: 100,
+  },
+  JsxEmit: {
+    ReactJSX: 4,
+  },
+};
+EOF
+fi
+
 next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p "$PORT"

+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..b90af80fb07c4deba30f18662e6f8eda17cc63f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/encounters/adjusted-xp/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -euo pipefail
+
+# Next 16 still probes for the TypeScript 5 compiler API path. The pinned
+# TypeScript 7 package has a different layout, but dev mode only needs these
+# values for setup when SWC/Turbopack compiles the app routes.
+if [ ! -f node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js ]; then
+  mkdir -p node_modules/typescript/lib
+  printf '{"type":"commonjs"}\n' > node_modules/typescript/lib/package.json
+  cat > node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js <<'EOF'
+const versionModule = require("./version.cjs");
+
+module.exports = {
+  version: versionModule.version || versionModule.default || "7.0.2",
+  ModuleKind: {
+    CommonJS: 1,
+    AMD: 2,
+    ES2020: 6,
+    ESNext: 99,
+    Node16: 100,
+    NodeNext: 199,
+    Preserve: 200,
+  },
+  ModuleResolutionKind: {
+    NodeJs: 2,
+    Node10: 2,
+    Node12: 2,
+    Node16: 3,
+    NodeNext: 99,
+    Bundler: 100,
+  },
+  JsxEmit: {
+    ReactJSX: 4,
+  },
+};
+EOF
+fi
+
 next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p "$PORT"

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}

+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}

+type PartyMember = {
+  level?: unknown;
+};
+
+type MonsterGroup = {
+  cr?: unknown;
+  count?: unknown;
+};
+
+type EncounterRequest = {
+  party?: unknown;
+  monsters?: unknown;
+};
+
+const XP_BY_CR: Record<string, number> = {
+  "0": 10,
+  "1/8": 25,
+  "1/4": 50,
+  "1/2": 100,
+  "1": 200,
+  "2": 450,
+  "3": 700,
+  "4": 1100,
+  "5": 1800,
+};
+
+const LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS = {
+  easy: 75,
+  medium: 150,
+  hard: 225,
+  deadly: 400,
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isPositiveInteger(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isSafeInteger(value) && value > 0;
+}
+
+function multiplierFor(monsterCount: number) {
+  if (monsterCount === 1) return 1;
+  if (monsterCount === 2) return 1.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 6) return 2;
+  if (monsterCount <= 10) return 2.5;
+  if (monsterCount <= 14) return 3;
+  return 4;
+}
+
+function difficultyFor(adjustedXp: number, thresholds: typeof LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS) {
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.deadly) return "deadly";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.hard) return "hard";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.medium) return "medium";
+  if (adjustedXp >= thresholds.easy) return "easy";
+  return "trivial";
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: EncounterRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.party) || !Array.isArray(body.monsters) || body.party.length === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const party = body.party as PartyMember[];
+  const monsters = body.monsters as MonsterGroup[];
+
+  if (!party.every((member) => member !== null && typeof member === "object" && member.level === 3)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  let baseXp = 0;
+  let monsterCount = 0;
+
+  for (const monster of monsters) {
+    if (monster === null || typeof monster !== "object" || typeof monster.cr !== "string" || !isPositiveInteger(monster.count)) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    const xp = XP_BY_CR[monster.cr];
+    if (xp === undefined) {
+      return badRequest();
+    }
+
+    baseXp += xp * monster.count;
+    monsterCount += monster.count;
+  }
+
+  if (monsterCount === 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const multiplier = multiplierFor(monsterCount);
+  const adjustedXp = baseXp * multiplier;
+  const thresholds = {
+    easy: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.easy * party.length,
+    medium: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.medium * party.length,
+    hard: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.hard * party.length,
+    deadly: LEVEL_3_THRESHOLDS.deadly * party.length,
+  };
+
+  return Response.json({
+    base_xp: baseXp,
+    monster_count: monsterCount,
+    multiplier,
+    adjusted_xp: adjustedXp,
+    difficulty: difficultyFor(adjustedXp, thresholds),
+    thresholds,
+  });
+}

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7c8435edfdc0c4f54cd8cc595af4525abe89d49c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/initiative/order/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+type Combatant = {
+  name?: unknown;
+  dex?: unknown;
+  roll?: unknown;
+};
+
+type InitiativeRequest = {
+  combatants?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: InitiativeRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(body.combatants)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const combatants = body.combatants as Combatant[];
+  const scored = combatants.map((combatant) => {
+    if (
+      combatant === null ||
+      typeof combatant !== "object" ||
+      typeof combatant.name !== "string" ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.dex) ||
+      !isNumber(combatant.roll)
+    ) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      name: combatant.name,
+      dex: combatant.dex,
+      score: combatant.roll + combatant.dex,
+    };
+  });
+
+  if (scored.some((combatant) => combatant === null)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  scored.sort((a, b) => {
+    if (a === null || b === null) return 0;
+    return b.score - a.score || b.dex - a.dex || a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
+  });
+
+  return Response.json({
+    order: scored.map((combatant) => ({
+      name: combatant?.name,
+      score: combatant?.score,
+    })),
+  });
+}

 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -euo pipefail
+
+# Next 16 still probes for the TypeScript 5 compiler API path. The pinned
+# TypeScript 7 package has a different layout, but dev mode only needs these
+# values for setup when SWC/Turbopack compiles the app routes.
+if [ ! -f node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js ]; then
+  mkdir -p node_modules/typescript/lib
+  printf '{"type":"commonjs"}\n' > node_modules/typescript/lib/package.json
+  cat > node_modules/typescript/lib/typescript.js <<'EOF'
+const versionModule = require("./version.cjs");
+
+module.exports = {
+  version: versionModule.version || versionModule.default || "7.0.2",
+  ModuleKind: {
+    CommonJS: 1,
+    AMD: 2,
+    ES2020: 6,
+    ESNext: 99,
+    Node16: 100,
+    NodeNext: 199,
+    Preserve: 200,
+  },
+  ModuleResolutionKind: {
+    NodeJs: 2,
+    Node10: 2,
+    Node12: 2,
+    Node16: 3,
+    NodeNext: 99,
+    Bundler: 100,
+  },
+  JsxEmit: {
+    ReactJSX: 4,
+  },
+};
+EOF
+fi
+
 next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p "$PORT"

+type AbilityCheckRequest = {
+  roll?: unknown;
+  modifier?: unknown;
+  dc?: unknown;
+};
+
+function isNumber(value: unknown): value is number {
+  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value);
+}
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: AbilityCheckRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (!isNumber(body.roll) || !isNumber(body.modifier) || !isNumber(body.dc)) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const total = body.roll + body.modifier;
+  const margin = total - body.dc;
+
+  return Response.json({
+    total,
+    success: total >= body.dc,
+    margin,
+  });
+}
diff --git a/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..fb9e80319e95aa0077626bb7aebcceb4e0a2fb3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/research-projects/2026-07-08-agent-language-choice/results/dnd-rest-benchmark/runs/20260708T224839Z_codex_gpt-5.5_typescript-nextjs/app/v1/dice/stats/route.ts

+const DICE_EXPRESSION = /^([0-9]+)d([0-9]+)(?:([+-])([0-9]+))?$/;
+
+type DiceRequest = {
+  expression?: unknown;
+};
+
+function badRequest() {
+  return Response.json({ error: "bad_request" }, { status: 400 });
+}
+
+export async function POST(request: Request) {
+  let body: DiceRequest;
+
+  try {
+    body = await request.json();
+  } catch {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  if (typeof body.expression !== "string") {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const match = DICE_EXPRESSION.exec(body.expression);
+  if (!match) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  const diceCount = Number(match[1]);
+  const sides = Number(match[2]);
+  const modifierValue = match[4] === undefined ? 0 : Number(match[4]);
+  const modifier = match[3] === "-" ? -modifierValue : modifierValue;
+
+  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(diceCount) || !Number.isSafeInteger(sides) || diceCount <= 0 || sides <= 0) {
+    return badRequest();
+  }
+
+  return Response.json({
+    dice_count: diceCount,
+    sides,
+    modifier,
+    min: diceCount + modifier,
+    max: diceCount * sides + modifier,
+    average: diceCount * (sides + 1) / 2 + modifier,
+  });
+}
